title: Surgeries | Alberto Costa
meta_description: I have held regular surgeries throughout South Leicestershire and endeavour to hold a surgery in a different location on every occasion - from Braunstone to Swinford, and Elmesthorpe to Countesthorpe - in order to make it as easy as possible for constituents to meet me and discuss their concerns
text_excerpt: Surgeries | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Surgeries Tweet I have held regular surgeries throughout South Leicestershire and endeavour to hold a surgery in a different location on every occasion - from Braunstone to Swinford, and Elmesthorpe to Countesthorpe - in order to make it as easy as possible for constituents to meet me and discuss their concerns or issues.
